# Changelog

All notable changes to this project are documented in this file.

## [0.3.0] - 2026-04-29

### Added

1. CI quality gates now include coverage and runtime dependency-audit checks.
2. Release workflow consistency with semantic-tag triggered verification and artifact publication.
3. Dependabot automation and a formal dependency update policy document (`DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md`).
4. Additional utility coverage tests for theme behavior in `src/utils/theme.test.js`.

### Contributor Credits

1. @Ramdragneel01 - quality-gate design, CI/release automation, dependency policy, and validation.

## [0.2.1] - 2026-04-29

### Added

1. Week 9 community visibility note set in README with contribution context for external PR and issue-review tracking.
2. Contributor credits section for this sprint release.

### Contributor Credits

1. @Ramdragneel01 - sprint planning, implementation, validation, and release publication.

## [0.2.0] - 2026-04-28

### Added

1. Top three featured case studies with STAR framing and measurable impact cards.
2. Release radar and maturity tags for flagship project visibility.
